name: meok-omnibus-tracker-mcp
summary: EU AI Act Digital Omnibus tracker MCP. Live source of truth for the EU AI Act delays following Parliament's 569-45 vote on 23 March 2026 — high-risk Annex III now 2 Dec 2027, Annex I now 2 Aug 2028, watermarking (Art 50) now 2 Nov 2026 (the new nearest cliff), Article 5 prohibitions + GPAI obligations + penalty regime UNCHANGED. Per-provision queryable status. Free tier — pure lead capture for Pro signed status attestations. By MEOK AI Labs.
